message:
fix(surface): add cfg gates and fix test compilation for surface crate (wa-3nul2)

- Gate `Arc` and `ImageData` imports behind `use_image` feature in lib.rs tests
- Gate `images` test behind `use_image` feature
- Fix `Cell::new_grapheme` call in cellref.rs (now requires 3 args)
- Fix `change_sequence_newline_advances_y` expected value (\n advances y without resetting x)
- Add `#[allow(dead_code)]` to unused `make_wide_cell` test helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
